topic: Designing and Implementing MCP: Best Practices and Challenges
verified_by: This authoring/audit-loop sandbox still blocks all python3 invocation beyond --version (confirmed again directly and via a fresh subagent), so no run in this thread captured a raw transcript. Real evidence instead: aep-article-check.yml's validate_article.py check_execution actually subprocess.run()s this command inside the unrestricted CI runner on every push -- run 29933532865, job 88969094053, against commit b34dddac5dce9b2b6a7ce1b4c6127fd623cb8355. That run's log shows zero 'project code failed to execute' errors (only the build_status one this update fixes), which check_execution's contract makes possible only if the real subprocess exited 0. See evidence_path for the full reasoning and links.
